_comment: Worked example of a NON-DIAGNOSTIC attributionReport (ADR-2605312700, lexicon com.etzhayyim.kizashi.attributionReport). 腰痛 (lower-back) case. Demonstrates G3 (no diagnosis/prescription field — only candidate contributing factors, never diseases), G7 (calibrated confidence + const disclaimer + consult recommendation), and weightPermille contributions summing to 1000 incl. an explicit uncertain residual. NOT real member data — illustration + R1 validation fixture. In production every PII-bearing field rides the encrypted payload; this example carries only the aggregate, non-PII shape.

contributions.factor: posture-derived (forward-head + anterior pelvic tilt; reduced lumbar ROM)
structural-suggestion (NOT assessed — requires licensed imaging; referral)

disclaimer: 所見は確定原因ではありません。受診を推奨します (This is a sign, not a confirmed cause; please consult a clinician).
